stemHtml: How does a change in Pressure Altitude influence the Landing Distance and Ground Roll Distance?

options.a: Higher Pressure Altitude results in a decreased Landing Distance Required and a decreased Ground Roll Distance.
options.b: Lower Pressure Altitude results in a decreased Landing Distance Required and an increased Ground Roll Distance.
options.c: Higher Pressure Altitude results in an increased Landing Distance Required and an increased Ground Roll Distance.
options.d: Lower Pressure Altitude results in an increased Landing Distance Required and a decreased Ground Roll Distance.
